name: tona-agent-studio
description: TONA Agent Studio with an integrated TeamFlow workspace.

scripts.check: node --check gateway.js && node --check server.js && npm --prefix teamflow-lite run check
scripts.test: npm --prefix teamflow-lite test && node tests/secrets-encryption.js && node tests/lark-secret-preservation.js && node tests/collaboration-policy.js && node tests/gateway-smoke.js
